content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/models.py:1	import string2	import random3	from database import get_db4	5	class URLModel:6	    @staticmethod7	    def generate_short_code(length=6):8	        chars = string.ascii_letters + string.digits9	        return ''.join(random.choice(chars) for _ in range(length))10	11	    @classmethod12	    def create_url(cls, original_url):13	        short_code = cls.generate_short_code()14	        with get_db() as conn:15	            conn.execute(16	                'INSERT INTO urls (original_url, short_code) VALUES (?, ?)',17	                (original_url, short_code)18	            )19	            conn.commit()20	        return short_code21	22	    @staticmethod23	    def get_original_url(short_code):24	        with get_db() as conn:25	            row = conn.execute(26	                'SELECT original_url FROM urls WHERE short_code = ?',27	                (short_code,)28	            ).fetchone()29	            return row['original_url'] if row else None
